infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Dokra needs your location to track your activities.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Dokra needs background location to track activities when the screen is off.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: Dokra uses motion sensors to count steps and detect movement during activities.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Dokra needs your location to accurately track activities.

plugins.motionPermission: Dokra uses motion sensors to count your steps.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Dokra to save activity photos to your Camera Roll.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow Dokra to save activity photos.
